text.title: Retro-ADR — Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the Retro-ADR file shape and the discovery-signal feed. ADR linter consumes both.

forbidden.pattern: status is `accepted` (forward) AND decided_on_estimated is set — must be one or the other
sources list empty — every retro claim must cite at least one evidence source
owner is a team name (e.g. "platform team") instead of a named individual
body contains `author_responsible` or `reason_undocumented` field — r1 violation
two retro-ADRs cover the same decision — supersede or merge instead of duplicating
capture session produced >3 retro-ADRs in a single sitting — r4 violation

allowed-transformations.transformation: Promote a retro-ADR to standard `accepted` status only after explicit team-wide review (not by single author).
Supersede a retro-ADR with a forward-looking ADR when the decision is consciously revisited.
Append `current_reconstruction` updates with date stamps; do not rewrite earlier reconstructions.

section.title: Discovery signal feed
section.p: The capture ritual consumes a weekly digest from `scripts/discover-undocumented-decisions.py`. Each candidate has:

list.item: occurrences: integer count across the discovery window
candidate_owner: most-recent code-author on the affected paths

section.p: Capture ritual processes top-3 by priority_score per session.

list.item: Frontmatter complete; owner is a named individual
Original intent and Current reconstruction are clearly separated
